title: aegilops squarrosa var. cylindrica
intro: Aegilops squarrosa var. cylindrica, also known as Aegilops cylindrica or jointed goatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aegilops squarrosa var. cylindrica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Aegilops squarrosa var. cylindrica can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs.
